message:
fix(safety): replace subtraction with saturating_sub to prevent integer underflow

Use saturating_sub() in place of bare subtraction across scoring and
entitlement computations to prevent panic on underflow:
- governance_scorecard: score delta computation
- acquisition_experiment_oracle: experiment budget arithmetic
- claim_entitlement: entitlement balance calculation
- frankenlab_release_gate_promotion: promotion threshold math
- specialization_rollback_gate: rollback counter decrement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
